case_title: ISMAEL FRANCISCO OSTOLAZA VS. MARIA CELESTE OROZCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED NOV-25-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT OROZCO, MARIA CELESTE
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY OSTOLAZA, ISMAEL FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT OROZCO, MARIA CELESTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-30-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-30-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERKS: S. VANTREE AND J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY OSTOLAZA, ISMAEL FRANCISCO OROZCO, MARIA CELESTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTOLAZA, ISMAEL FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROZCO, MARIA CELESTE $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT OROZCO, MARIA CELESTE
